name: part_000
file: tmp_[Official] 3D Anime ＂Magical Girl holoWitches! THE STAGE ~TRICK or MAGIC!~＂ Main Story [_qpO8vi9fpA]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_000.webm

scenes.description: Introduction to the HoloWitches and the world of HoloCas.
The HoloWitches prepare backstage for their Halloween performance.
The HoloWitches perform their opening act on stage.

subtitles.original: 僕たちは配信アプリ、ホロキャスで活動する配信者。
subtitles.english: We are streamers who are active on the streaming app, HoloCas.

subtitles.original: 突然画面に吸い込まれて、アプリと繋がる謎の世界、ホロキャス界に来ちゃった。
subtitles.english: Suddenly, we were sucked into the screen and ended up in the HoloCas World—a mysterious realm connected to the app.

subtitles.original: そこでは、現実で苦しむ人の魂が怪物化してしまう現象、夢落ちが起こっていた。
subtitles.english: In that world, a phenomenon called 'Dreamfall' was occurring, where the souls of people suffering in reality turned into monsters.

subtitles.original: 怪物コラプサーを倒して、みんなの魂を取り戻さないと。
subtitles.english: We have to defeat the monster Corruptors and take back everyone's souls.

subtitles.original: そうして、魔法少女に変身して、戦うことになった。
subtitles.english: And so, we ended up transforming into magical girls to fight.

subtitles.original: みんなの心を助けて、夢を応援する！
subtitles.english: Saving everyone's hearts and supporting their dreams!

subtitles.original: それが...
subtitles.english: That is...

subtitles.original: 魔法少女ホロウィッチ！
subtitles.english: Magical Girl HoloWitch!

subtitles.original: 今日はスペシャルハロウィンステージ！
subtitles.english: Today is the Special Halloween Stage!

subtitles.original: ホロキャスの人気配信者が多数出演！
subtitles.english: Many popular HoloCas streamers will be performing!

subtitles.original: さらに、今をときめく超人気歌手のカノンさんも参加する、超、超豪華イベント！
subtitles.english: What's more, the incredibly popular singer Kanon will be joining us in this super, super extravagant event!

subtitles.original: で、その超豪華イベントのオープニングアクトをうちら6人が担当することになって、
subtitles.english: So, the six of us were put in charge of the opening act for this super extravagant event,

subtitles.original: せっかくだし、みんなでホロウィッチの衣装を着て、ドカンと派手に盛り上げちゃおうかなーって。
subtitles.english: and I thought it'd be cool if we all wore our HoloWitch outfits and really livened things up with a bang.

subtitles.original: でもいいのかな？魔法とか、妖精とか、一応内緒なんだけど。
subtitles.english: But is that okay? Magic and fairies are supposed to be a secret, you know.

subtitles.original: 今日はハロウィンだから、仮装ってことにすれば、なんとかなるなる！
subtitles.english: Since it's Halloween today, we can just say it's cosplay, so it'll work out somehow!

subtitles.original: そうそう。
subtitles.english: Exactly.

subtitles.original: って、そろそろ準備した方が良くない？
subtitles.english: Wait, shouldn't we start getting ready soon?

subtitles.original: そうだね。
subtitles.english: You're right.

subtitles.original: じゃ、気合入れていきますか！
subtitles.english: Then, let's get fired up and go for it!

subtitles.original: トリック・オア...
subtitles.english: Trick or...

subtitles.original: ...トリート！
subtitles.english: ...Treat!

subtitles.original: ねっ中、ねっ中、ねっ中、
subtitles.english: Obsessed, obsessed, obsessed,

subtitles.original: 足りないでしょ？
subtitles.english: It's not enough, is it?

subtitles.original: こっちおいで遊ぼうよ
subtitles.english: Come over here and let's play

subtitles.original: ねこちゅーシンドローム
subtitles.english: Nekochu Syndrome

subtitles.original: イライライライライラして
subtitles.english: Feeling irritated, irritated, irritated...

subtitles.original: 楽しくいられぬために、現況
subtitles.english: In this current situation where we can't stay happy

subtitles.original: イライライライライラしてたら
subtitles.english: If you keep feeling irritated like that

subtitles.original: 魂抜ける、もったいない！
subtitles.english: Your soul will slip away—what a waste!

subtitles.original: どうしたら喜んでくれるかな、さぁ。
subtitles.english: How can I make you happy? Let's see.

subtitles.original: 思いついては即行動、スマイルハンター！
subtitles.english: Acting as soon as I think of it—Smile Hunter!

subtitles.original: お望み君のツボ、ピンポイント撃ち抜いちゃお、絶好
subtitles.english: I'll hit your sweet spot with pinpoint precision, perfect!

subtitles.original: 魔法だもん、愛の呪文、ホロキャスと、コンサート！
subtitles.english: It's magic, a spell of love! HoloCas and concert!

subtitles.original: まだまだ仕掛けちゃえ！
subtitles.english: I've got even more tricks up my sleeve!

subtitles.original: あっという間に捕まえた！
subtitles.english: Caught you in a flash!

subtitles.original: ねっ中、ねっ中、ねっ中シンドローム
subtitles.english: Netchu, Netchu, Netchu Syndrome

subtitles.original: いたずらからのハピネス
subtitles.english: Happiness coming from a prank

subtitles.original: ねっ中、ねっ中、ねっ中したら
subtitles.english: When you're obsessed, obsessed, obsessed

subtitles.original: ギュってね、爆死です、スマイルに！
subtitles.english: With a squeeze, I'm dying of joy from your smile!

subtitles.original: 年中無休カーニバル、好きが重なれば
subtitles.english: A year-round carnival, when our 'likes' pile up

subtitles.original: 年中無休カーニバル、お祭り
subtitles.english: A year-round carnival, a festival

subtitles.original: ねっ中、ねっ中、ねっ中足りない
subtitles.english: Netchu, Netchu, Netchu, it's not enough

subtitles.original: こっちおいで遊ぼうよ
subtitles.english: Come over here and let's play

subtitles.original: とに角に、信じちゃえ、ほらね！
subtitles.english: Anyway, just believe in it, see!

subtitles.original: 未来は完璧、アドレナリン飛ば飛ばさせちゃうんです
subtitles.english: The future is perfect, I'll make your adrenaline soar

subtitles.original: 降伏したらみんなが...
subtitles.english: Once you surrender, everyone...

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、私の出番！
subtitles.english: Wait a minute, it's my turn!

subtitles.original: どういうこと！？
subtitles.english: What do you mean!?

subtitles.original: もうハチャメチャだー！
subtitles.english: It's a total mess now!

subtitles.original: 案じ真似違っても、同じ道行く
subtitles.english: Even if our paths look different, we're going the same way

subtitles.original: 響き合って集まれば、詰まり最強じゃん！
subtitles.english: When we resonate and gather, we're basically the strongest!

subtitles.original: ねっ中、ねっ中、ねっ中シンドローム
subtitles.english: Netchu, Netchu, Netchu Syndrome

subtitles.original: 高鳴りすぎて白熱
subtitles.english: Hearts racing so fast, we're glowing white-hot

subtitles.original: ねっ中、ねっ中、ねっ中、至宝、極上のウィンク！
subtitles.english: Netchu, Netchu, Netchu treasure—the ultimate wink!

subtitles.original: 異世界から見せたいよ、目一杯の愛
subtitles.english: I want to show you my full love from another world

subtitles.original: こんなにも近くにいるよ！
subtitles.english: I'm standing right here, so close!

subtitles.original: 年中無休で笑いたい、君と笑いあいたいな
subtitles.english: I want to laugh year-round, I want to laugh with you

subtitles.original: やよやよよし、していたら、いつのまにか救われちゃう
subtitles.english: If I keep doing this, before you know it, you'll be saved

subtitles.original: 幸せすぎて困っちゃう、浮かべたら花盛り！
subtitles.english: So happy it's a problem, blossoming with joy!

subtitles.original: ねっ中、ねっ中、ねっ中シンドローム
subtitles.english: Netchu, Netchu, Netchu Syndrome

subtitles.original: いたずらからのハピネス
subtitles.english: Happiness coming from a prank

subtitles.english: When you're obsessed, obsessed, obsessed

subtitles.original: ギュってね、爆死です、スマイルに！
subtitles.english: With a squeeze, I'm dying of joy from your smile!

subtitles.original: 年中無休カーニバル、好きが重なれば
subtitles.english: A year-round carnival, when our 'likes' pile up

subtitles.original: 年中無休カーニバル、お祭り
subtitles.english: A year-round carnival, a festival

subtitles.english: Netchu, Netchu, Netchu, it's not enough

subtitles.original: こっちおいで遊ぼうよ
subtitles.english: Come over here and let's play

subtitles.english: Anyway, just believe in it, see!
